spec.name: Ergan's Cell
spec.description: This large cell is almost like a living quarters with a cot in one corner serving as a bed, a small table built out of the wall in another corner. There is even a rug in the center of the floor to keep some warmth. It seems that the prisoner kept here is treated quite well, almost too well for a murderer of an entire town...

north.description: The cell door to the north leads back to the prison hallway.
